name: agentic-contact-center
description: ClueCon 2026 agentic contact center POC scaffold

scripts.docker:proof: sh -c 'LOCAL_UID=${LOCAL_UID:-$(id -u)} LOCAL_GID=${LOCAL_GID:-$(id -g)} docker compose run --rm proof'
scripts.docker:smoke: sh -c 'cleanup(){ docker compose down --remove-orphans; }; trap cleanup EXIT; docker compose up --build -d app && node scripts/health-smoke.mjs --url http://127.0.0.1:8026/health'
scripts.docker:voice: docker compose --profile voice up --build app rtc-asr kokoro
scripts.docker:browser-webrtc: docker compose --profile browser-webrtc up --build app rtc-asr kokoro browser-webrtc-bridge
scripts.docker:sip-verto: docker compose --profile sip-verto up --build app freeswitch rtc-asr kokoro pipecat-verto-bridge
scripts.assert:full: npm run assert:export && npm run assert:viewer
scripts.proof:pipecat: npm run pipecat:check && npm run proof --
scripts.docker:freeswitch: docker compose --profile freeswitch up --build app freeswitch
scripts.docker:sip: docker compose --profile sip up --build app freeswitch rtc-asr kokoro freeswitch-bridge
scripts.pipecat:webrtc:install: rm -rf .pipecat-runtime && python3 -m pip install --target .pipecat-runtime -r requirements-pipecat-voice.txt && python3 -m pip install --target .pipecat-runtime --upgrade --force-reinstall opencv-python-headless==4.13.0.92
